name: NBHD Insights Tools
description: Trajectory + memory-of-insights tools for the assistant baseline. Phase 1 read tools: history / snapshot / compare. Phase 2 baseline + write-side: baseline / list / record / confirm / refute. Phase 1 supports pillar=gravity only.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override NBHD API base URL. Defaults to NBHD_API_BASE_URL env var.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for NBHD runtime endpoint requests.
